name: 阿莱娜·洛德金娜
awards: 2022年 第75届洛迦诺国际电影节 当代电影人单元金豹奖 (提名) 汽油
name_full: 阿莱娜·洛德金娜 Alena Lodkina

last_movies.title: There Is No Such Thing as a Jellyfish

introduction: Alena Lodkina is a Russian-born Australian filmmaker. Strange Colours, the first feature film that she directed and co-wrote, was produced through the Venice Biennale College and premiered at Venice Film Festival in 2017. Petrol, her second feature film as writer/director, premiered at Locarno Film Festival in 2022 and was shown at New Directors/New Films 2023, where it was named ‘a standout' by The New Yorker. Alena' s fiction and non-fiction writing has appeared in Heat, The Stinging Fly, Senses of Cinema, 4:3 Journal, Meanjin and Fireflies. She was a MacDowell fellow in 2024. She is currently developing her new film, Twice Over, co-written with the Australian novelist Miles Allinson and produced by Neversleep Pictures.
